sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts'; interface PortfolioItem { id: number; title: string; description: string; category: string; rating: number; earnings: number; } interface ClientProject { id: number; clientName: string; projectName: string; status: 'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed'; budget: number; deadline: string; } const ContractorDashboard: React.FC = () => { // Mock data for portfolio items const [portfolioItems, setPortfolioItems] = useState([ { id: 1, title: 'Corporate Law Expert', description: 'Specialized in corporate governance and compliance', category: 'Corporate Law', rating: 4.8, earnings: 12500 }, { id: 2, title: 'Criminal Defense Specialist', description: 'Experienced in criminal litigation and appeals', category: 'Criminal Law', rating: 4.9, earnings: 18750 }, { id: 3, title: 'Family Law Mediator', description: 'Expert in divorce and child custody cases', category: 'Family Law', rating: 4.7, earnings: 9800 } ]); // Mock data for client projects const [clientProjects, setClientProjects] = useState([ { id: 1, clientName: 'ABC Corporation', projectName: 'Contract Review', status: 'in_progress', budget: 5000, deadline: '2023-12-15' }, { id: 2, clientName: 'John Smith', projectName: 'Personal Injury Case', status: 'pending', budget: 7500, deadline: '2023-11-30' }, { id: 3, clientName: 'XYZ Ltd', projectName: 'Intellectual Property', status: 'completed', budget: 12000, deadline: '2023-10-20' } ]); // Mock data for charts const earningsData = [ { month: 'Jan', earnings: 4000 }, { month: 'Feb', earnings: 3000 }, { month: 'Mar', earnings: 2000 }, { month: 'Apr', earnings: 2780 }, { month: 'May', earnings: 1890 }, { month: 'Jun', earnings: 2390 }, ]; const categoryData = [ { name: 'Corporate Law', value: 45 }, { name: 'Criminal Law', value: 30 }, { name: 'Family Law', value: 15 }, { name: 'Other', value: 10 }, ]; const COLORS = ['#4F46E5', '#10B981', '#F59E0B', '#EF4444']; const getStatusColor = (status: string) => { switch (status) { case 'completed': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'; case 'in_progress': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'; case 'pending': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'; default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'; } }; return (

Contractor Dashboard

Manage your portfolio and client projects

{/* Summary Cards */}

Total Earnings

$45,250

Completed Projects

24

Active Clients

18

Portfolio Items

12

{/* Charts Section */}
{/* Earnings Chart */}

Earnings Overview

{/* Category Distribution */}

Expertise Distribution

`${name}: ${(percent as number * 100).toFixed(0)}%`} > {categoryData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
{/* Portfolio Items */}

Portfolio Items

{portfolioItems.map(item => (

{item.title}

{item.rating} ★

{item.description}

{item.category} ${item.earnings.toLocaleString()}
))}
{/* Client Projects */}

Client Projects

{clientProjects.map(project => ( ))}
Client Project Status Budget Deadline Actions
{project.clientName}
{project.projectName}
 {project.status.replace('_', ' ')} ${project.budget.toLocaleString()} {project.deadline}
); }; export default ContractorDashboard;
